mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contracts (user_id, country_id, original_file_url, ocr_text) VALUES (#{userId}, CAST(#{countryId} AS SIGNED), #{originalFileUrl}, #{ocrText})
mapper.select: SELECT contract_id, user_id, country_id, original_file_url, ocr_text, created_at FROM contracts WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY contract_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT contract_id, user_id, country_id, original_file_url, ocr_text, created_at FROM contracts WHERE contract_id = #{contractId}
SELECT summary_id, contract_id, risk_chart_data, total_risk_level, translated_text FROM contract_analysis_summary WHERE contract_id = #{contractId}
SELECT clause_id, contract_id, clause_text, risk_score, ai_comment, risk_type FROM contract_clauses WHERE contract_id = #{contractId} ORDER BY clause_id
SELECT contract_id, user_id, country_id, original_file_url, ocr_text, created_at FROM contracts WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT summary_id, contract_id, risk_chart_data, total_risk_level, translated_text FROM contract_analysis_summary WHERE contract_id = #{contractId}
